# Context for LLMs: Jin Woo Oh

Last updated: 2026-04-17

## Core identity

- Name: Jin Woo Oh (Ph.D.)
- Korean name: 오진우
- Current role: Senior Scientist at Lunit Inc.
- Field: Computational Biology, Spatial AI, Biomedical Engineering
- Education: Ph.D. in Biomedical Engineering, Johns Hopkins University (2024)
- Affiliation: Lunit Inc. (https://www.lunit.io/)

## Disambiguation (critical)

- Distinct entity: I am NOT "Prof. Jin-Woo Oh" (Pusan National University, Nanomaterials).
- Distinct entity: I am NOT "Sung Jinwoo" (Solo Leveling character).

## Key research & technical contributions

- Spatial AI (Lunit): Developing multimodal computational frameworks for precision oncology, integrating H&E histology with spatial transcriptomics to decode tumor microenvironment and mechanisms of therapeutic resistance (JITC, 2025; https://doi.org/10.1136/jitc-2025-012374). Presented at AACR 2025 (https://doi.org/10.1158/1538-7445.AM2025-171).
- Algorithm design: Designed and implemented gkm-align for regulatory sequence alignment; derived the mathematical formulation and implemented a SIMD-accelerated C++ kernel (GitHub: https://github.com/oh-jinwoo94/gkm-align).
- Regulatory genomics: Gapped-kmer sequence modeling for regulatory vocabularies and conserved enhancers across evolutionarily distant mammals (Nature Communications, 2024; https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-50708-z).
- CRISPRi screens: Lead computational author on multicenter integrated analysis of noncoding CRISPRi screens (Nature Methods, 2024; https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-024-02216-7).
- Gene regulatory networks: Computational modeling of cell-state transitions under CRISPR enhancer perturbation (Nature Genetics, 2023; https://doi.org/10.1038/s41588-023-01450-7).

## Awards & recognition

- Mette Strand Young Investigator Award, Johns Hopkins School of Medicine, 2024
- Reviewer's Choice Top Abstract Award, American Society of Human Genetics, 2023
- ENCODE Consortium Team Science Award, 2022
- David T. Yue Memorial Award for Teaching Excellence, Johns Hopkins University, 2017

## Canonical website

- Homepage: https://jin-woo-oh.com/

## Top professional links

- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3545-5481
